title: Clair · Semantic News API
excerpt: The news API that matches meaning, not keywords. Describe what you're watching for and get the articles that mean it. Scored, deterministic, auditable, open-core.
content_html:
Open-Source Semantic news API

Every news API matches keywords. Clair matches meaning.

Keyword search returns everything that says the word and misses everything that means it. Describe what you’re watching for in a sentence and Clair returns the news that means it. Scored, explainable, and yours to reproduce, audit, and tune.

example.py and its live output

Sources

Get started

$curl -sX POST https://clair-news-api.p.rapidapi.com/v1/match -d '{"text":"central bank interest rate decision"}'

Send a phrase. We embed it server-side and return the news that means it. No vectors, no SDK, no local model.

How it works

Pure vector math, deterministic by design.

We split each article into smaller parts called chunks, and every chunk gets embedded, using bge-m3, an open model. We employ MaxSim algorithm to find the best-matching chunk. Even a long article that spends one paragraph squarely on your topic still reaches you. No LLM sits anywhere in this path, which is why the same article and the same query always produce the same score.

Explainable

Every result carries its score and the exact chunk of text that produced it, not an opaque relevance ranking.

Auditable

Deterministic by construction: the same article and the same query always produce the same score.

No hallucinations

Matching is vector math, not generation. It can surface a weak match, but it can't invent an article or a quote.

Access

Call the API, read the algorithm behind it, ask for what’s missing.

API

Query the news

Describe what you're watching for as a phrase, or send your own vector, and get back the articles that mean it, each with its score. Metered per request.

Explore the API →

Open source

Check the math

Don't want to trust a black box? The scoring algorithm is public under Apache-2.0. Read exactly how a score is produced and reproduce it yourself.

View the source →

Requests

Shape what's next

Need a source added, higher throughput, or an endpoint that isn't here yet? Tell us what you're working on. We'd love to help you build it.

Get in touch →

Build on the world’s news.

One endpoint, a curated set of trusted sources, and a score you can check. Explore the API, or read exactly how it works.

content_html_zh:
开源语义新闻 API

每个新闻 API 都匹配关键字。 克莱尔符合意义。

关键字搜索会返回包含该单词的所有内容，但会错过表示该单词的所有内容。 用一句话描述您正在观看的内容，克莱尔就会返回您所关注的新闻。 已评分、可解释，可供您重现、审核和调整。

example.py 及其实时输出

来源

开始使用

$curl -sX POST https://clair-news-api.p.rapidapi.com/v1/match -d '{"text":"央行利率决定"}'

发送一个短语。 我们将其嵌入服务器端并返回意味着它的新闻。 没有向量，没有SDK，没有本地模型。

它是如何运作的

纯向量数学，设计上具有确定性。

我们将每篇文章分成称为块的更小的部分，并且使用开放模型 bge-m3 嵌入每个块。 我们采用 MaxSim 算法来找到最佳匹配的块。 即使是一篇很长的文章，只用一个段落来讨论你的主题，你仍然能理解。 没有法学硕士位于这条路径的任何地方，这就是为什么同一篇文章和相同的查询总是产生相同的分数。

可解释的

每个结果都带有它的分数和产生它的确切文本块，而不是不透明的相关性排名。

可审计

构造确定性：同一篇文章和相同的查询总是产生相同的分数。

无幻觉

匹配是向量数学，而不是生成。 它可以显示弱匹配，但不能发明一篇文章或引用。

使用权

调用 API，阅读其背后的算法，询问缺少的内容。

API

查询新闻

用短语描述您正在观看的内容，或发送您自己的向量，然后获取表示该内容的文章，每篇文章都有其分数。 按请求计量。

探索 API →

开源

检查数学

不想相信黑匣子？ 评分算法在 Apache-2.0 下是公开的。 准确阅读乐谱是如何产生的并自己复制。

查看源码→

要求

塑造下一步

需要添加源、更高吞吐量或尚不存在的端点？ 告诉我们您正在做什么。 我们很乐意帮助您构建它。

联系我们 →

以世界新闻为基础。

一个端点、一组精选的可信来源以及您可以检查的分数。 探索 API，或准确阅读它的工作原理。
